case_title: EARL GLEN NOVEY VS. MABEL CHONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $85.00 SERVED AUG-22-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY EARL GLEN NOVEY--TRUSTEE. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DEREK NELSON--EMPLOYEE. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY EARL GLEN NOVEY TTEE FOR DANIELLA NOVEY REVOCABLE TRUST 7/15/19 AS TO DEFENDANT CHONG, MABEL SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EARL GLEN NOVEY TTEE FOR DANIELLA NOVEY REVOCABLE TRUST 7/15/19 IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHONG, MABEL SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
